pi_items.source: No verification found. Name does not appear in any data CSVs (employees_import.csv, bangalore_employees.csv, project_leads.csv, innovation_team.csv, q4_new_hires.csv). Other tasks reference different employee names (Rajesh Nair in EMP-1024, Michael Scott in EMP-007, Reid Ryan/Jessica Owens/etc in numeric IDs).

Format inconsistency detected. Task q4_compliance_data_fix uses numeric IDs (108, 120, 135, 148, 113, 137) directly. Task add_employee_dependent references EMP-1024 (with hyphen). Other task artifacts show EMP-007. No employee with ID 'EMP003' found in any data source.
No independent verification possible. Date is within valid range but cannot be confirmed against actual database. Setup scripts that would create this attendance record do not exist for this task.
Standard business hours time. Verifier.py accepts variations (09:00, 9:00, 9:0) but no actual database record confirmed.
Standard 9-to-6 business hours time. Verifier.py accepts variations (18:00, 18:0) but no actual database record confirmed.

Environment setup script (setup_attendhrm.ps1) and q4_compliance_data_fix setup script both reference 'C:\Program Files (x86)\Attend HRM\Data\DEMO.FDB' as the actual database path. Metadata claims different path in ProgramData.

privileged_info_summary: AttendHRM is a real HRMS product by Lenvica that uses Firebird databases. The environment uses a demo database (DEMO.FDB) located at C:\Program Files (x86)\Attend HRM\Data\DEMO.FDB. Employee data in the system uses numeric IDs (108, 120, 135, 148, etc.) or hyphenated IDs (EMP-1024, EMP-007), not 'EMP003'. No verification was possible for the claimed employee 'Robert Johnson' or the metadata values, as the task references setup scripts (setup_task.ps1, export_result.ps1) that do not exist in the task directory. The metadata database path contradicts the actual configuration used in working setup scripts.
